site_name: THE UNIVERSITY OF LOUISIANA AT MONROE

citations.narrative:
A facility representative was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:30pm on June
4, 2026. The inspector spoke with the lab tech, who did not have access to the required documentation. He called both
the facility manager and the IACUC Chair, who were not available for inspection and not able to provide remote access to
the documentation. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A facility representative was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:30pm on June 
4, 2026. The inspector spoke with the lab tech, who did not have access to the required documentation. He called both 
the facility manager and the IACUC Chair, who were not available for inspection and not able to provide remote access to 
the documentation. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA 
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
